label: Trainability
description: Defines an animal intelligence level that gates which training steps a pawn can learn. Referenced by TrainableDef.requiredTrainability and RaceProperties.trainability.

intelligenceOrder.label: Intelligence order
intelligenceOrder.description: Numeric rank used to compare intelligence levels. Higher values represent greater trainability. Shipped values: None=0, Intermediate=20, Advanced=30.

new-trainability.label: New trainability
new-trainability.description: Minimal trainability def with a defName ready for authoring.
